reviews.comment:
Aca es como para tomarse un descanso, cargar café y agua fresca y seguir viaje...OJO que a veces no hay combustibles nafta infinita ni gasoil euro... me pasó volviendo del norte con el focus tdci.... buena atención tanto en playa como en el bar...gracias chicos !!!

(Translated by Google)
This is a good place to take a break, stock up on coffee and fresh water, and continue your journey... Just be aware that sometimes there's no fuel available, neither regular gasoline nor Euro diesel... it happened to me coming back from the north in my Focus TDCI... great service both on the beach and in the bar... thanks guys!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3c3FLM2VnEAE
